title: Event-transfer limits in liquefaction case histories: effective-stress margins, CPT transitional-band residuals and site-investigation value
description: Reproducibility package with deterministic analysis scripts, derived outputs, provenance records, sensitivity checks, and publication figure sources for a study of event-transfer validation, predictability limits, geological residual controls, and value-of-information in seismic soil liquefaction case histories.

creators.name: REN, Lijian
creators.affiliation: School of Civil Engineering, Inner Mongolia University of Technology; Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region Key Laboratory of Green Construction and Intelligent Operation and Maintenance of Civil Engineering; College of Civil and Transportation Engineering, Hohai University
